body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Move input parsing out of experiments/ and into a new module in src/.

Part of #1610

## Content
- [x] Create `Input.jl` module
- [x] Move `argparse_settings()` and `parse_commandline()` from `cli_options.jl`
- [x] Update references to use `Input.argparse_settings` and `Input.parse_commandline`
- [x] Move `get_coupler_config_dict()` and `get_coupler_args()` to `Input.jl`
- [x] Update `setup_run.jl` to use `Input.get_coupler_config_dict` and `Input.get_coupler_args`
- [x] Delete `cli_options.jl` and `arg_parsing.jl`
- [x] Add docs page explaining how to provide inputs to model
- [x] Add tests
- [x] Verify buildkite results are unchanged


<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [ ] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: add Input module
